CustomField.description: System Auto populates the value to true if the utilization type is 'Assumed/Estimated'. This will be copied to invoice record for the insert and update case.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select if the utilization is on assumed or estimated basis. Assumed URs will not contribute towards Maintenance Reserves and Cycles/Hours on the aircraft and assemblies.
CustomField.label: _Assumed/Estimated?
